content.en:
Jiong seemed to be aware of the arrival of the Lanyue Dao Ancestor, so he did not open the ban on the medicine garden and the dojo.

Before, after the True Monarchs entered the dojo, Jiong no longer restricted the entry of the dojo, as long as the True Monarch arrived, he would open the ban and let the True Monarchs enter the dojo.

If there is a true monarch leaving, Jiong will not be restricted, and the ban will also be opened.

It can be said that the ban on the export of the medicine garden has been open for almost a long time.

But now, the Lanyue Dao Ancestor has arrived, but the ban that has been open for a long time has been closed, and there is no sign of opening.

This shows that Jiong is afraid of the Moon Dao Ancestor!

Perhaps the strength of the incarnation of the Lanyue Dao Ancestor is not very strong, but his knowledge and other means are far superior to those of the True Monarch.

Jiong was willing to let the True Monarchs in, but he didn't dare to let a Dao Ancestor incarnate in.

Because it is impossible for the Dao Ancestor incarnation to honestly enter the treasure land to cultivate, and it is impossible to participate in any assessments, he will only forcibly occupy the dojo and plunder the treasures and opportunities here.

"It's a powerful ban, but it can't bother me!"

Lanyue Daozu said softly.

After all, the prohibition here was only arranged casually by the Red Dragon Dao Ancestor, and it would not take a long time to arrange it like the dojo defense array.

With Lanyue Daozu's insight and understanding of the formation, it won't take too long to parse this prohibition.

......

Inside the Red Dragon Dojo.

Jiong saw the incarnation of the Lanyue Dao Ancestor in the outside world through the prohibition, and his face was gloomy.

"Dao Ancestor incarnation is coming, it's trouble!"

He had actually expected this to happen a long time ago, but he hoped that the Dao Ancestor incarnation could come later, so that he could control more True Monarchs.

At that time, he could spend means to improve the strength of these True Monarchs, and if he cultivated a human puppet of the True Ancestor realm, he could easily block the Dao Ancestor incarnation.

But now, it's too late.

He is not a real living being, just the spirit of the Red Dragon Dojo, and the Red Dragon Dao Ancestor has no ability to endow him with living beings at all, there is no way to cultivate, and there is no way to exert his strong strength.

What he can do is to control the prohibition of the Red Dragon Dojo, unless the Dao Ancestor incarnation enters some place, he can use the prohibition to trap the opponent, but it is difficult to kill the opponent.

But the question is, where would the Dao Ancestor incarnation easily fall into the trap.

"For now, the plan is to attract the True Monarchs into the Red Dragon Pool for transformation as soon as possible. "

Jiong thought to himself.

Immediately, he made a decision, which was to fully open the Red Dragon Pool, double the effect of the Red Dragon Pool, and he informed the other True Monarchs.

In this way, there will definitely be many true monarchs who will enter the Red Dragon Pool for the first time.

Of course, there may be some True Monarchs who will be wary of doubts, but this does not affect anything, the greedy True Monarch will definitely occupy the majority, he only needs to control more True Monarchs, this is the most important thing at the moment.

Time passed little by little, and the incarnation of Lanyue Daozu had been researching the ban, but it was unrealistic to want to break the ban quickly.

After all, this is the Dojo of the Red Dragon Dao Ancestor, and the ban of the Red Dragon Dojo is the prohibition of the domain realm, which is slightly different from the prohibition of this chaotic region to a certain extent, and it is the prohibition of the two systems.

Therefore, Lanyue Dao Ancestor needs to spend a little time researching, otherwise it can only be cracked through strong strength.

But Lanyue Dao Ancestor is currently in an incarnation state, not a real body, and it is difficult to exert too strong strength, so he can't break the ban.

Half a month passed in a flash.

this day.

Lanyue Daozu laughed wildly: "Hahaha, the ban has finally been broken!"

As Lanyue Dao Ancestor's hands continued to seal, it hit the prohibition.

Soon, the prohibition began to melt, revealing a huge hole.

But at this moment, Lanyue Dao Ancestor's expression changed.

"Damn, Tumen, Mengyue, Fengbo, the three of you are here too!"

Lanyue Daozu looked at the distance behind him and said coldly.

"We're here a long time ago, but we didn't bother you when we saw that you were so focused on breaking the ban!"

As soon as the words fell, three figures appeared, and they were the incarnations of the three Dao Ancestors.

These three Dao Ancestor incarnations learned the news of this dojo and immediately rushed over, but when they saw that Lanyue Dao Ancestor was breaking the ban, they did not show up, but hid silently in the back.

Ye Tian only knew at this time that there were three Dao Ancestor incarnations behind him, and his expression suddenly changed.

Dao Ancestor's concealment methods were too strong, and he didn't even find out.

The point is that after the three Dao Ancestor incarnations appeared, he vaguely felt the cold gaze of one Dao Ancestor, although it was only a quick glance, but it had already caught his attention.

"Which Dao Ancestor incarnation is going to be unfavorable to me?"

Ye Tian secretly guessed.

He didn't know much about these three Dao Ancestors, he only knew that Mengyue Dao Ancestor was a Dao Ancestor in Dream Valley, but he was very unfamiliar with the other two Dao Ancestors.

"Ye Tian boy, you pay attention, that Tumen Dao Ancestor is from the Blood Moon Sect, he is a secretly hidden Dao Ancestor of the Blood Moon Sect, it was only revealed not long ago, you Void Heaven and the Blood Moon Sect have a grudge, you have to be careful!"

Lanyue Daozu reminded.

The reason why he reminded Ye Tian was not that he cared about Ye Tian, but that he himself did not deal with the Tumen Dao Ancestor, so he informed Ye Tian that if he could cause a little trouble to the Tumen Dao Ancestor, it would be quite good.

"Thank you Lanyue Daozu!"

Ye Tianchuan thanked him.

The incarnation of the Four Great Dao Ancestors came, and they didn't fight, after all, it was undoubtedly too stupid to fight and fight before they even saw the opportunity.

Although the Tumen Dao Ancestor wanted to kill Ye Tian, he didn't make a move, after all, it was not the last time to make a move, and the most important thing was to enter the dojo first.

Whoa!!

The incarnation of the Four Great Dao Ancestors entered the dojo, and Ye Tian also followed in, he couldn't go in if he didn't go in, the Four Great Dao Ancestor incarnations would definitely not allow him to escape from here.

Rumble!!!

Jiong appeared, carrying the power of the Red Dragon Dojo, as if a supreme being had descended, but this was just momentum and no strength, fooling people.

The Dao Ancestor incarnation naturally would not be fooled by Jiong, completely ignoring Jiong's momentum.

"Ye Tian, you and I have traded, why did you bring the Dao Ancestors?"

Jiong asked angrily.

Ye Tian waved his hands and hurriedly said, "I didn't bring this, but the Dao Ancestors found it themselves, and I didn't say anything!"

Jiong knew that Ye Tian didn't reveal it, he was just venting.

"The incarnation of the Four Great Dao Ancestors, don't you know what happened to the Red Dragon Dojo? there are nothing good here, it's just some small things that are useful to the True Monarch and True Ancestor!" Jiong said with a smile.

"Needless to explain, there is a Taoist inheritance here, and there are many precious treasures. "Lanyue Dao Ancestor Dao.

Jiong said helplessly: "It's just a few weak Dao Techniques, it shouldn't be of much use to all Dao Ancestors, and the Red Dragon Dao Ancestor has not fallen, if a few Dao Ancestors want to be unfavorable to the Red Dragon Dojo, you can think clearly!"

"What, the Red Dragon Dao Ancestor didn't fall?"

When Ye Tian heard this, he was immediately shocked.
